arts.ttl: Liverpool receive injury boost ahead of Champions League clash with PSV
arts.sum: Liverpool have received some positive news on the injury front as Joe Gomez has returned to training ahead of their Uefa Champions League meeting with PSV Eindhoven. The defender has been sidelined for the past seven matches with a hamstring injury that he sustained against West Ham United on 29 December. However, manager Arne Slot […] The post Liverpool receive injury boost ahead of Champions League clash with PSV first appeared on The Football Faithful.
